title: Examination of Conscience
introduction: Use this guide before Confession to examine your conscience thoroughly. Each commandment is listed with common sins to consider. Be honest with yourself — God already knows your sins. The purpose is for YOU to recognize them, confess them, and resolve to amend your life.
preparatoryPrayer: Come, Holy Ghost, enlighten my mind that I may clearly know my sins. Move my heart that I may be sincerely sorry for them, confess them honestly, and firmly resolve to amend my life. O Blessed Virgin Mary, Mother of God, pray for me. My Guardian Angel, help me to make a good examination of conscience.

commandments.commandment: I am the Lord thy God; thou shalt not have strange gods before Me.
commandments.latinText: Non habébis deos aliénos coram me.
sins: Have I doubted or denied the existence of God?
Have I failed to pray daily?
Have I put anything before God — money, career, pleasures, another person?
Have I believed in or consulted horoscopes, fortune tellers, or the occult?
Have I received Holy Communion in a state of mortal sin?
Have I despaired of God's mercy, or presumed upon it?
Have I been ungrateful for God's blessings?

commandments.commandment: Thou shalt not take the name of the Lord thy God in vain.
commandments.latinText: Non assúmes nomen Dómini Dei tui in vanum.
sins: Have I used God's name carelessly or in anger?
Have I cursed or used profane language?
Have I sworn a false oath or broken a vow?
Have I spoken disrespectfully of sacred things, the saints, or the Church?
Have I murmured against God when things went wrong?

commandments.commandment: Remember to keep holy the Lord's Day.
sins: Have I missed Mass on Sundays or Holy Days of Obligation without grave reason?
Have I arrived late or left early from Mass through my own fault?
Have I been willfully distracted during Mass?
Have I done unnecessary servile work on Sundays?
Have I failed to make Sunday a day of rest and worship?

commandments.commandment: Honor thy father and thy mother.
commandments.latinText: Honóra patrem tuum et matrem tuam.
sins: Have I been disobedient or disrespectful to my parents?
Have I neglected my duties to my family?
Have I failed to care for aging parents?
Have I failed to raise my children in the Catholic faith?
Have I given scandal to my children by my bad example?
Have I been disrespectful to legitimate authority?
Have I taken a human life or assisted in doing so?
Have I had or encouraged an abortion?
Have I entertained thoughts of hatred, revenge, or violence?
Have I held grudges or refused to forgive?
Have I harmed another by word or deed?
Have I given scandal — leading another into sin?
Have I abused alcohol or drugs?
Have I been reckless with my own health or safety?
Have I been unfaithful in marriage, in thought or deed?
Have I engaged in impure actions, alone or with others?
Have I willfully entertained impure thoughts or desires?
Have I viewed pornography or other impure images?
Have I dressed immodestly or acted in a way to tempt others?
Have I used artificial contraception?
Have I stolen anything, large or small?
Have I cheated anyone or been dishonest in business?
Have I failed to pay my debts?
Have I damaged another's property?
Have I been wasteful with money or resources?
Have I failed to give to the poor according to my means?
Have I failed to tithe or support the Church?

commandments.commandment: Thou shalt not bear false witness against thy neighbor.
commandments.latinText: Non loquéris contra próximum tuum falsum testimónium.
sins: Have I lied?
Have I gossiped or spoken ill of others behind their back?
Have I revealed another's faults or sins without just cause?
Have I judged others rashly or uncharitably?
Have I failed to defend someone's good name when I could?
Have I flattered others insincerely for selfish reasons?

commandments.commandment: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbor's wife.
sins: Have I willfully entertained impure thoughts about another person?
Have I failed to guard my eyes and imagination?
Have I put myself in occasions of sin against purity?
Have I been jealous of another's relationship or family?

commandments.commandment: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbor's goods.
sins: Have I been envious of what others have?
Have I been greedy or materialistic?
Have I been discontent with what God has given me?
Have I wished harm or misfortune on others out of jealousy?

precepts.title: Precepts of the Church
items: Have I failed to attend Mass on Sundays and Holy Days?
Have I failed to confess my sins at least once a year?
Have I failed to receive Holy Communion during the Easter season?
Have I failed to observe the prescribed days of fasting and abstinence?
Have I failed to contribute to the support of the Church?

closingPrayer: O my God, I am heartily sorry for having offended Thee, and I detest all my sins because I dread the loss of heaven and the pains of hell; but most of all because they offend Thee, my God, Who art all good and deserving of all my love. I firmly resolve, with the help of Thy grace, to confess my sins, to do penance, and to amend my life. Amen.
